metadata.label: Subject(s)
metadata.value: Photograph; Portrait photography; Boot, Florence Annie (-1952), Baroness Trent; niversity of Nottingham photographs

metadata.label: Abstract
metadata.value: Photograph of Lady Florence Boot, wife of Jesse Boot, 1st Baron Trent, benefactor of University College Nottingham. Florence Boot donated the money to build the first hall of residence for women students at the University, which was named after her. The photograph is in a souvenir album presented by Walter Millis to University College Nottingham, to celebrate the opening of the new buildings at University Park in July 1928.

metadata.label: Title
metadata.value: Photograph of Lady Florence Boot, c.1928.
